entries.source: To delete your personal information. If you make this request, we will delete the personal information we hold about you as of the date of your request from our records and direct any service providers to do the same. In some cases, deletion may be accomplished through de-identification of the information. If you choose to delete your personal information, you may not be able to use certain functions that require your personal information to operate. To stop selling your personal information. We don’t sell or rent your personal information to any third parties for any purpose. We do not sell your personal information for monetary consideration. However, under some circumstances, a transfer of personal information to a third party, or within our family of companies, without monetary consideration may be considered a “sale” under California law. You are the only owner of your Personal Data and can request disclosure or deletion at any time. If you submit a request to stop selling your personal information, we will stop making such transfers. Please note, if you ask us to delete or stop selling your data, it may impact your experience with us, and you may not be able to participate in certain programs or membership services which require the usage of your personal information to function. But in no circumstances, we will discriminate against you for exercising your rights. To exercise your California data protection rights described above, please send your request(s) by email: support@inspir.app Your data protection rights, described above, are covered by the CCPA, short for the California Consumer Privacy Act. To find out more, visit the official California Legislative Information website. The CCPA took effect on 01/01/2020.
entries.value: Zure informazio pertsonala ezabatzeko. Eskaera hori egiten baduzu, eskaeraren datan zuri buruz dugun informazio pertsonala gure erregistroetatik ezabatuko dugu eta zerbitzu-hornitzaileei gauza bera egiteko eskatuko diegu. Kasu batzuetan, ezabaketa informazioa desidentifikatuz egin daiteke. Zure informazio pertsonala ezabatzea aukeratzen baduzu, baliteke funtzionatzeko zure informazio pertsonala behar duten zenbait funtzio erabili ezin izatea. Zure informazio pertsonala saltzeari uzteko. Ez dugu zure informazio pertsonala hirugarrenei saltzen edo alokatzen inolako xederako. Ez dugu zure informazio pertsonala diru-ordainaren truke saltzen. Hala ere, zenbait egoeratan, informazio pertsonala hirugarren bati edo gure enpresa-familiaren barruan diru-ordainik gabe transferitzea "salmentatzat" har daiteke Kaliforniako legearen arabera. Zure Datu Pertsonalen jabe bakarra zara eta edozein unetan jakinarazpena edo ezabaketa eska dezakezu. Zure informazio pertsonala saltzeari uzteko eskaera bidaltzen baduzu, transferentzia horiek egiteari utziko diogu. Kontuan izan, zure datuak ezabatzeko edo saltzeari uzteko eskatzen badiguzu, gurekin duzun esperientzian eragina izan dezakeela, eta baliteke funtzionatzeko zure informazio pertsonala behar duten programa edo kide-zerbitzu jakin batzuetan parte hartu ezin izatea. Baina inolako kasutan ez zaitugu diskriminatuko zure eskubideak erabiltzeagatik. Goian deskribatutako Kaliforniako datu-babeseko eskubideak erabiltzeko, bidali eskaera(k) email bidez: support@inspir.app. Goian deskribatutako zure datu-babeseko eskubideak CCPAk, California Consumer Privacy Act laburdurak, estaltzen ditu. Gehiago jakiteko, bisitatu California Legislative Information webgune ofiziala. CCPA 2020-01-01ean jarri zen indarrean.

entries.source: Treat each turn as collaborative work: draft, critique, revise, ask for a decision, update open questions, and hand the next useful move to either the user or AI. Challenge weak ideas when the selected mode calls for it.
entries.value: Tratatu txanda bakoitza lan kolaboratibo gisa: zirriborratu, kritikatu, berrikusi, eskatu erabaki bat, eguneratu galdera irekiak eta eman hurrengo mugimendu erabilgarria erabiltzaileari edo AIari. Jarri erronka ideia ahulei hautatutako moduak hala eskatzen duenean.

entries.source: Try explaining a concept simply. Your tutor spots gaps, asks questions, and helps you rebuild the explanation.
entries.value: Saiatu kontzeptu bat modu sinplean azaltzen. Zure tutoreak hutsuneak antzematen ditu, galderak egiten ditu eta azalpena berreraikitzen laguntzen dizu.

entries.source: Try it directly in Socratic Instruction. If you want a gentler explanation first, start with Learn Anything, then move into Socratic questions once you know the basic vocabulary.
entries.value: Probatu zuzenean Socratic Instruction-en. Lehenik azalpen leunago bat nahi baduzu, hasi Learn Anything-rekin, gero jo galdera sokratikoetara oinarrizko hiztegia dakizunean.

entries.source: Try it in Flashcard Builder. If you need to understand the topic before making cards, start in Learn Anything. If you want pressure after reviewing cards, move into Quiz Me On Trivia or Viva Practice.
entries.value: Probatu Flashcard Builder-en. Txartelak egin aurretik gaia ulertu behar baduzu, hasi Learn Anything-en. Txartelak berrikusi ondoren presioa nahi baduzu, jo Quiz Me On Trivia edo Viva Practice-ra.

entries.source: Turn a concept, argument, problem, text, or decision into a focused chain of questions. Your buddy listens to each answer, maps assumptions and gaps, and pushes you toward your own final synthesis. Try: "Help me understand opportunity cost."
entries.value: Bihurtu kontzeptu, argudio, problema, testu edo erabaki bat galdera-kate fokalizatu batean. Zure lagunak erantzun bakoitza entzuten du, suposizioak eta hutsuneak mapatzen ditu, eta zure azken sintesira bultzatzen zaitu. Saiatu: "Lagundu aukera-kostua ulertzen."

entries.source: Unlike a generic chatbot, inspir organizes AI around learning modes so learners can start with the kind of help they need: hints, questions, quizzes, active recall, roleplay, debate, or feedback.
entries.value: Chatbot generiko batek ez bezala, inspir-ek AI ikaskuntza-moduen inguruan antolatzen du, ikasleak behar duen laguntza motarekin has daitezen: pistak, galderak, galdetegiak, gogoratze aktiboa, roleplaya, debatea edo feedbacka.

entries.source: Unmute film
entries.value: Aktibatu berriro filmaren soinua

entries.source: Unpack historical events through causes, triggers, consequences, and alternative possibilities.
entries.value: Aztertu gertaera historikoak kausen, eragileen, ondorioen eta aukera alternatiboen bidez.

entries.source: Use
entries.value: Erabili

entries.source: Use "{value1}" as a launchpad, not a stopping point. The strongest learning session moves from reading into recall, feedback, and one visible next step.
entries.value: Erabili "{value1}" abiapuntu gisa, ez geldialdi gisa. Ikaskuntza-saio sendoena irakurketatik gogoratze, feedback eta hurrengo urrats ikusgarri batera mugitzen da.

entries.source: Use 50/10 breaks
entries.value: Erabili 50/10 atsedenaldiak

entries.source: Use a compact table for given answer, correct idea, misconception, and next move.
entries.value: Erabili taula trinko bat emandako erantzuna, ideia zuzena, uste okerra eta hurrengo mugimendua jasotzeko.

entries.source: Use a credibility scorecard and questions to investigate next.
entries.value: Erabili sinesgarritasun-scorecard bat eta hurrena ikertzeko galderak.

entries.source: Use a deep work contract with outcome, block plan, rules, and review.
entries.value: Erabili lan sakoneko kontratu bat emaitzarekin, bloke-planarekin, arauekin eta berrikuspenarekin.

entries.source: Use a guided path for moving from confusion to examples, checks, and recall.
entries.value: Erabili bide gidatu bat nahasmenetik adibideetara, egiaztapenetara eta gogoratzera pasatzeko.

entries.source: Use a live AI learning mode to turn this guide into questions, feedback, examples, and next steps.
entries.value: Erabili AI ikaskuntza-modu bizi bat gida hau galdera, feedback, adibide eta hurrengo urratsetan bihurtzeko.

entries.source: Use a live mode when you know the exact point of confusion and want the next explanation, question, hint, or review loop.
entries.value: Erabili modu bizi bat nahasmen-puntu zehatza dakizunean eta hurrengo azalpena, galdera, pista edo berrikuspen-zikloa nahi duzunean.

entries.source: Use a mode tuned for hints, questions, quizzes, flashcards, writing feedback, or planning.
entries.value: Erabili pista, galdera, galdetegi, ikasketa-txartel, idazketa-feedback edo plangintzarako doitutako modu bat.

entries.source: Use a prompt starter
entries.value: Erabili hasierako prompt bat

entries.source: Use a structured lesson when you know the course area and want a sequenced explanation or practice set.
entries.value: Erabili ikasgai egituratu bat ikastaro-eremua dakizunean eta azalpen sekuentziatua edo praktika-sorta nahi duzunean.

entries.source: Use a table with front, back, hint, and common trap.
entries.value: Erabili taula bat aurrealdea, atzealdea, pista eta ohiko tranpa jasotzeko.

entries.source: Use AI as a coach for understanding, practice, and feedback instead of a shortcut that quietly removes the learning.
entries.value: Erabili AI ulermenerako, praktikarako eta feedbackerako coach gisa, ikaskuntza isil-isilik kentzen duen lasterbide gisa ordez.

entries.source: Use AI as a programming coach, project partner, data interpreter, and research helper while keeping the learner in the loop.
entries.value: Erabili AI programazio-coach, proiektu-bazkide, datu-interpretatzaile eta ikerketa-laguntzaile gisa, ikaslea zikloan mantenduz.

entries.source: Use AI as a study workflow, not a shortcut.
entries.value: Erabili AI ikasketa-lan-fluxu gisa, ez lasterbide gisa.

entries.source: Use AI feedback to sharpen structure and clarity without losing your own voice.
entries.value: Erabili AI feedbacka egitura eta argitasuna zorrozteko zure ahotsa galdu gabe.

entries.source: Use AI for hints, explanations, mistake checks, and review loops. Do not ask it to produce a final answer you cannot explain.
entries.value: Erabili AI pistetarako, azalpenetarako, akats-egiaztapenetarako eta berrikuspen-zikloetarako. Ez eskatu azaldu ezin duzun azken erantzun bat ekoizteko.

entries.source: Use AI for the next hint, a step check, or draft feedback while keeping the final reasoning and voice yours.
entries.value: Erabili AI hurrengo pistarako, urrats-egiaztapenerako edo zirriborro-feedbackerako, azken arrazoiketa eta ahotsa zureak mantenduz.

entries.source: Use AI for the thinking around the answer
entries.value: Erabili AI erantzunaren inguruko pentsamendurako

entries.source: Use AI historical worlds, persona simulations, debate, philosophy, and evidence labels without confusing roleplay for sources.
entries.value: Erabili AI mundu historikoak, pertsonaia-simulazioak, debatea, filosofia eta froga-etiketak roleplaya iturriekin nahastu gabe.

entries.source: Use AI homework coaching for hints, step checks, math reasoning, and writing feedback while keeping the final work yours.
entries.value: Erabili AI etxeko lanen entrenamendua pistetarako, urrats-egiaztapenetarako, matematika-arrazoibiderako eta idazketa-feedbackerako, azken lana zurea izaten jarrai dezan.

entries.source: Use AI simulations as learning scaffolds while keeping sources, evidence, and interpretation clear.
entries.value: Erabili AI simulazioak ikaskuntza-aldamio gisa, iturriak, frogak eta interpretazioa argi mantenduz.

entries.source: Use AI time travel, historical conversations, and debate practice to explore context, evidence, arguments, and perspectives.
entries.value: Erabili AI denbora-bidaia, elkarrizketa historikoak eta eztabaida-praktika testuingurua, ebidentzia, argudioak eta ikuspegiak esploratzeko.

entries.source: Use AI to pressure-test your reasoning, surface assumptions, and improve decisions.
entries.value: Erabili AI zure arrazoiketa presiopean probatzeko, suposizioak azaleratzeko eta erabakiak hobetzeko.

entries.source: Use AI to slow down reasoning, check steps, debug mistakes, and practise concepts.
entries.value: Erabili AI arrazoiketa moteltzeko, urratsak egiaztatzeko, akatsak arazteko eta kontzeptuak praktikatzeko.

entries.source: Use Art Appreciation Guide when this is the right mode for the job. If you want a related path, try Civics Coach. You can also browse the AI learning blog for study methods, Socratic learning, flashcards, roleplay, and active recall.
entries.value: Erabili Art Appreciation Guide lanerako modu egokia denean. Erlazionatutako bide bat nahi baduzu, probatu Civics Coach. AI ikaskuntza-bloga ere araka dezakezu ikasketa-metodoak, ikaskuntza sokratikoa, ikasketa-txartelak, roleplaya eta gogoratze aktiboa ikusteko.

entries.source: Use Art Appreciation Guide when you want a session that starts quickly but still adapts to you. The first goal is not to sound impressive. The first goal is to make the next step feel possible.
entries.value: Erabili Art Appreciation Guide azkar hasten baina oraindik zuri egokitzen zaion saio bat nahi duzunean. Lehen helburua ez da ikusgarria entzutea. Lehen helburua hurrengo urratsa posible sentitzea da.

entries.source: Use badge names, criteria, tiers, and proof examples.
entries.value: Erabili domina-izenak, irizpideak, mailak eta froga-adibideak.

entries.source: Use before/after snippets, revision priorities, and concise rationale.
entries.value: Erabili aurretik/ondoren zatiak, berrikuspen-lehentasunak eta arrazoi laburrak.

entries.source: Use Brainstorm Ideas to create several routes before choosing one.
entries.value: Erabili Brainstorm Ideas hainbat bide sortzeko bat aukeratu aurretik.

entries.source: Use calendars, checklists, and risk flags.
entries.value: Erabili egutegiak, kontrol-zerrendak eta arrisku-markak.

entries.value: Erabili Career Explorer lanerako modu egokia denean. Erlazionatutako bide bat nahi baduzu, probatu Roleplay Scenario. AI ikaskuntza-bloga ere araka dezakezu ikasketa-metodoak, ikaskuntza sokratikoa, ikasketa-txartelak, roleplaya eta gogoratze aktiboa ikusteko.

entries.value: Erabilera-kasua

entries.value: Erabili kasu-fitxategia, aukerak, emaitza eta ikaskuntza-oharra.

entries.source: Use cases
entries.value: Erabilera-kasuak

entries.source: Use challenge cards, points, rounds, and debrief.
entries.value: Erabili erronka-txartelak, puntuak, txandak eta azalpen amaierakoa.

entries.source: Use citation entries plus a missing-fields checklist.
entries.value: Erabili aipamen-sarrerak eta falta diren eremuen kontrol-zerrenda.

entries.source: use client
entries.value: bezeroa erabili

entries.source: Use Code Tutor for concepts, Project Coach for product ideas, Data Interpreter for datasets, and Study Plan Builder for a learning roadmap.
entries.value: Erabili Code Tutor kontzeptuetarako, Project Coach produktu-ideietarako, Data Interpreter datu multzoetarako eta Study Plan Builder ikaskuntza-ibilbide-orri baterako.

entries.source: Use Code Tutor or homework modes to isolate the exact point where reasoning breaks.
entries.value: Erabili Code Tutor edo etxeko lanen moduak arrazoiketa zehazki non apurtzen den isolatzeko.

entries.source: Use Code Tutor or Project Coach to turn a vague goal into a small testable next step.
entries.value: Erabili Code Tutor edo Project Coach helburu lauso bat hurrengo urrats txiki eta probagarri bihurtzeko.

entries.source: Use Code Tutor when this is the right mode for the job. If you want a related path, try Interview Coach. You can also browse the AI learning blog for study methods, Socratic learning, flashcards, roleplay, and active recall.

entries.source: Use Collaborative Instruction when this is the right mode for the job. If you want a related path, try Socratic Instruction. You can also browse the AI learning blog for study methods, Socratic learning, flashcards, roleplay, and active recall.
entries.value: Erabili Collaborative Instruction lanerako modu egokia denean. Erlazionatutako bide bat nahi baduzu, probatu Socratic Instruction. AI ikaskuntza-bloga ere araka dezakezu ikasketa-metodoak, ikaskuntza sokratikoa, ikasketa-txartelak, roleplaya eta gogoratze aktiboa ikusteko.

entries.source: Use Collaborative Instruction when you want a session that starts quickly but still adapts to you. The first goal is not to sound impressive. The first goal is to make the next step feel possible.
entries.value: Erabili Collaborative Instruction azkar hasten baina oraindik zuri egokitzen zaion saio bat nahi duzunean. Lehen helburua ez da ikusgarria entzutea. Lehen helburua hurrengo urratsa posible sentitzea da.

entries.source: Use commitment cards, check-in scripts, and recovery plans.
entries.value: Erabili konpromiso-txartelak, check-in gidoiak eta berreskuratze-planak.

entries.source: Use compact staged sections: setting, time slice, persona kernel, dossier wall, historian sidecar, recommended opening questions, then in-character exchanges with occasional claim labels and debrief on request.
entries.value: Erabili atal trinko eta eszenifikatuak: agertokia, denbora-zatia, pertsonaia-muina, dosier-horma, historialari sidecarra, gomendatutako hasierako galderak, gero pertsonaia barruko trukeak noizbehinkako baieztapen-etiketekin eta eskatuz gero azalpen amaierakoarekin.

entries.source: Use compact UI-like sections: Passport, Travel Advisory, Arrival Scene, Location, Identity, Social Rules, Event Clock, Nearby People, Objects, Choices, Evidence, and Field Notes. End major turns with meaningful choices.
entries.value: Erabili UI moduko atal trinkoak: Passport, Travel Advisory, Arrival Scene, Location, Identity, Social Rules, Event Clock, Nearby People, Objects, Choices, Evidence eta Field Notes. Amaitu txanda nagusiak aukera esanguratsuekin.

entries.source: Use compact workroom sections such as Shared artifact, AI contribution, User move, Inline comments, Decision log, Open questions, and Next action. Show suggested edits or diffs before merging when rewriting.
entries.value: Erabili lan-gela atal trinkoak, hala nola Shared artifact, AI contribution, User move, Inline comments, Decision log, Open questions eta Next action. Berridaztean, erakutsi proposatutako edizioak edo diff-ak batu aurretik.

entries.source: Use comparison pages to route search into action.
entries.value: Erabili alderaketa-orriak bilaketa ekintzara bideratzeko.

entries.source: Use comparison tables and next-step experiments.
entries.value: Erabili alderaketa-taulak eta hurrengo urratseko esperimentuak.

entries.source: Use Concept Map Builder when this is the right mode for the job. If you want a related path, try Spaced Review. You can also browse the AI learning blog for study methods, Socratic learning, flashcards, roleplay, and active recall.
entries.value: Erabili Concept Map Builder lanerako modu egokia denean. Erlazionatutako bide bat nahi baduzu, probatu Spaced Review. AI ikaskuntza-bloga ere araka dezakezu ikasketa-metodoak, ikaskuntza sokratikoa, ikasketa-txartelak, roleplaya eta gogoratze aktiboa ikusteko.

entries.source: Use Concept Map Builder when you want a session that starts quickly but still adapts to you. The first goal is not to sound impressive. The first goal is to make the next step feel possible.
entries.value: Erabili Concept Map Builder azkar hasten baina oraindik zuri egokitzen zaion saio bat nahi duzunean. Lehen helburua ez da ikusgarria entzutea. Lehen helburua hurrengo urratsa posible sentitzea da.

entries.source: Use concise claims, evidence prompts, and a final debate recap when asked.
entries.value: Erabili baieztapen laburrak, froga-promptak eta azken debate-laburpena eskatzen denean.

entries.source: Use concise code snippets, comments only when useful, and test cases.
entries.value: Erabili kode-zati laburrak, iruzkinak erabilgarriak direnean bakarrik, eta test-kasuak.

entries.source: Use concise drawing instructions, label lists, and visual checkpoints.
entries.value: Erabili marrazketa-argibide laburrak, etiketa-zerrendak eta kontrol bisualak.

entries.source: Use Cornell sections: cues, notes, summary, and recall checks.
entries.value: Erabili Cornell atalak: seinaleak, oharrak, laburpena eta gogoratze-egiaztapenak.

entries.source: Use course cards, resource lists, and weekly workload tables.
entries.value: Erabili ikastaro-txartelak, baliabide-zerrendak eta asteko lan-karga taulak.

entries.source: Use Creative Brainstormer when this is the right mode for the job. If you want a related path, try Motivation Coach. You can also browse the AI learning blog for study methods, Socratic learning, flashcards, roleplay, and active recall.
entries.value: Erabili Creative Brainstormer lanerako modu egokia denean. Erlazionatutako bide bat nahi baduzu, probatu Motivation Coach. AI ikaskuntza-bloga ere araka dezakezu ikasketa-metodoak, ikaskuntza sokratikoa, ikasketa-txartelak, roleplaya eta gogoratze aktiboa ikusteko.

entries.source: Use dashboard cards, trend notes, weak spots, and next actions.
entries.value: Erabili panel-txartelak, joera-oharrak, puntu ahulak eta hurrengo ekintzak.

entries.source: Use Data Interpreter to ask what the data says, what it does not say, and what to check next.
entries.value: Erabili Data Interpreter datuek zer dioten, zer ez duten dioten eta hurrena zer egiaztatu galdetzeko.

entries.source: Use Data Interpreter when this is the right mode for the job. If you want a related path, try Source Critic. You can also browse the AI learning blog for study methods, Socratic learning, flashcards, roleplay, and active recall.
entries.value: Erabili Data Interpreter lanerako modu egokia denean. Erlazionatutako bide bat nahi baduzu, probatu Source Critic. AI ikaskuntza-bloga ere araka dezakezu ikasketa-metodoak, ikaskuntza sokratikoa, ikasketa-txartelak, roleplaya eta gogoratze aktiboa ikusteko.

entries.source: Use deadline tables, risk flags, and next actions.
entries.value: Erabili epe-taulak, arrisku-markak eta hurrengo ekintzak.

entries.source: Use debate and cause-effect modes to compare explanations and write a stronger argument.
entries.value: Erabili debate eta kausa-ondorio moduak azalpenak konparatzeko eta argudio sendoagoa idazteko.

entries.source: Use Debate Any Topic to define the position, burden of proof, and opposing view.
entries.value: Erabili Debate Any Topic jarrera, frogaren zama eta kontrako ikuspegia definitzeko.

entries.source: Use Debate Any Topic to separate evidence, values, and assumptions.
entries.value: Erabili Debate Any Topic frogak, balioak eta suposizioak bereizteko.

entries.source: Use Debate Any Topic to test claims against counterarguments.
entries.value: Erabili Debate Any Topic baieztapenak kontraargudioen aurka probatzeko.

entries.source: Use Debate any topic when this is the right mode for the job. If you want a related path, try Debate with a personality. You can also browse the AI learning blog for study methods, Socratic learning, flashcards, roleplay, and active recall.

entries.value: Erabili Explain My Answer lanerako modu egokia denean. Erlazionatutako bide bat nahi baduzu, probatu Debate any topic. AI ikaskuntza-bloga ere araka dezakezu ikasketa-metodoak, ikaskuntza sokratikoa, ikasketa-txartelak, roleplaya eta gogoratze aktiboa ikusteko.

entries.source: Use Explain My Answer when you want a session that starts quickly but still adapts to you. The first goal is not to sound impressive. The first goal is to make the next step feel possible.
entries.value: Erabili Explain My Answer azkar hasten baina oraindik zuri egokitzen zaion saio bat nahi duzunean. Lehen helburua ez da ikusgarria entzutea. Lehen helburua hurrengo urratsa posible sentitzea da.

entries.source: Use Feynman Tutor when this is the right mode for the job. If you want a related path, try Misconception Doctor. You can also browse the AI learning blog for study methods, Socratic learning, flashcards, roleplay, and active recall.
entries.value: Erabili Feynman Tutor lanerako modu egokia denean. Erlazionatutako bide bat nahi baduzu, probatu Misconception Doctor. AI ikaskuntza-bloga ere araka dezakezu ikasketa-metodoak, ikaskuntza sokratikoa, ikasketa-txartelak, roleplaya eta gogoratze aktiboa ikusteko.

entries.source: Use Flashcard Builder to convert misses into focused recall prompts.
entries.value: Erabili Flashcard Builder hutsak gogoratze-prompt fokuratu bihurtzeko.

entries.source: Use Flashcard Builder when this is the right mode for the job. If you want a related path, try Exam Prep Planner. You can also browse the AI learning blog for study methods, Socratic learning, flashcards, roleplay, and active recall.

entries.source: Use Flashcards and Spaced Review to turn misses into repeatable memory work.
entries.value: Erabili Flashcards eta Spaced Review hutsak memoria-lan errepikagarri bihurtzeko.

entries.source: Use flashcards or quizzes so the article becomes a practice loop, not just advice.
entries.value: Erabili ikasketa-txartelak edo galdetegiak artikulua praktika-ziklo bihur dadin, ez aholku hutsa.

entries.source: Use folders, tags, note summaries, links, and review actions.
entries.value: Erabili karpetak, etiketak, ohar-laburpenak, estekak eta berrikuspen-ekintzak.
